diagrams.title: DNS Query Resolution Process
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process of DNS resolution from client computer through recursive resolver, root server, TLD server, and authoritative server back to the client
diagrams.purpose: Explains how DNS translates domain names to IP addresses through the hierarchical lookup process

diagrams.title: HTTP Request and Response Message Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the format and components of HTTP request and response messages including request line, headers, and body for both client and server
diagrams.purpose: Explains the structure and components of HTTP messages for understanding web communication

diagrams.title: Common DNS Record Types
diagrams.description: Displays the most commonly used DNS record types with their format and purpose in the DNS namespace
diagrams.purpose: Introduces different DNS record types and their specific roles in the domain name system
